articles.author: Kate Murphy
articles.title: Is hantavirus like COVID-19? Five infectious disease experts answer some of the biggest questions about the outbreak. - Yahoo
articles.description: Plus, medical experts share the virus they consider more concerning to the American public.
articles.content: The hantavirus outbreak aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius has made headlines for weeks, and while U.S. health officials say the risk to the American population is low, news about a virus can be anxie… [+10249 chars]
